questionHtml: Identify one error associated with the use of an accurate stopwatch.
markschemeHtml:
human reaction time/delay «starting/stopping the stopwatch»  [✔]

Note: Do not accept “inaccurate stopwatch”.

meta.title: Identify one error associated with the use of an accurate stopwatch.
breadcrumbLabels: 11.1 Uncertainties and errors in measurement and results
